creator: corky1951@comcast.net
text:
Update to 1.0.5
Take maintainership
-----------
From the author's NEWS, version 1.0.5:
* finds newer locations of the rgb.txt file,
* is adapted for altered extension handling in recent libpng versions.
-----------
Version 1.0.4 was a minor bug fix to canonicalize code
Version 1.0.3 added some RPM packaging fixes, and thus didn't affect the FreeBSD port
-----------

Fix: ------------
Files added or deleted: None
Minor changes only
------------
